message:
fix: use grouped sessions for re-adopt and set window-size on targets (#85)

Re-adopt now uses tmux new-session -t (grouped session) instead of
attach-session, giving each client independent window sizing. Also sets
window-size largest on the target session to override session-level
settings (like manual) that cause dots in desktop terminals.

Fixes stale grouped clone cleanup to only remove sessions where
session_name != session_group (preserving originals).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
